default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Deep dive into Rimkus' Built Environment Solutions (BES) practice area to understand services, priorities, and market positioning.](https://fathom.video/share/pHaHJJ1jw_xk7DCwsH47ubfrgQMwjooa?tab=summary&timestamp=91.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [BES provides comprehensive proactive services for the built environment, focusing on structural engineering, due diligence, and mechanical/electrical consulting](https://fathom.video/share/pHaHJJ1jw_xk7DCwsH47ubfrgQMwjooa?tab=summary&timestamp=749.0)
  - [Priority regions have specific building codes/regulations that drive demand for BES services (e.g. Florida's HB 913, New York's Local Law 97)](https://fathom.video/share/pHaHJJ1jw_xk7DCwsH47ubfrgQMwjooa?tab=summary&timestamp=942.0)
  - [Rimkus differentiates through in-house expertise across multiple disciplines, allowing holistic solutions for complex projects](https://fathom.video/share/pHaHJJ1jw_xk7DCwsH47ubfrgQMwjooa?tab=summary&timestamp=465.0)
  - [Content strategy should emphasize Rimkus' ability to provide sustainable, maintainable, and resilient solutions that create long-term value for clients](https://fathom.video/share/pHaHJJ1jw_xk7DCwsH47ubfrgQMwjooa?tab=summary&timestamp=1777.0)

## Topics

### BES Overview and Positioning

  - [BES is one of three main Rimkus service groups, focusing on proactive services for the built environment](https://fathom.video/share/pHaHJJ1jw_xk7DCwsH47ubfrgQMwjooa?tab=summary&timestamp=234.0)
  - [Positioned as a high-quality, well-known player in the industry (analogous to Nordstrom in retail)](https://fathom.video/share/pHaHJJ1jw_xk7DCwsH47ubfrgQMwjooa?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)
  - [Comprehensive suite of services for commercial buildings, institutions, and property portfolios](https://fathom.video/share/pHaHJJ1jw_xk7DCwsH47ubfrgQMwjooa?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)
  - [Key value proposition: in-house expertise across multiple disciplines, reducing coordination costs for clients](https://fathom.video/share/pHaHJJ1jw_xk7DCwsH47ubfrgQMwjooa?tab=summary&timestamp=465.0)

### Priority Service Areas

1.  Structural Engineering
      - [Condition assessments](https://fathom.video/share/pHaHJJ1jw_xk7DCwsH47ubfrgQMwjooa?tab=summary&timestamp=771.0)
      - [Building code compliance](https://fathom.video/share/pHaHJJ1jw_xk7DCwsH47ubfrgQMwjooa?tab=summary&timestamp=771.0)
      - [Garage inspections and repairs](https://fathom.video/share/pHaHJJ1jw_xk7DCwsH47ubfrgQMwjooa?tab=summary&timestamp=771.0)
2.  Due Diligence
      - [Real estate transactions](https://fathom.video/share/pHaHJJ1jw_xk7DCwsH47ubfrgQMwjooa?tab=summary&timestamp=1502.0)
      - [Property evaluations for investors, brokers, and insurance companies](https://fathom.video/share/pHaHJJ1jw_xk7DCwsH47ubfrgQMwjooa?tab=summary&timestamp=1502.0)
3.  Mechanical and Electrical Consulting
      - [Energy efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/pHaHJJ1jw_xk7DCwsH47ubfrgQMwjooa?tab=summary&timestamp=1938.0)
      - [System design and upgrades](https://fathom.video/share/pHaHJJ1jw_xk7DCwsH47ubfrgQMwjooa?tab=summary&timestamp=1813.0)

### Regional Focus and Regulations

  - [Services often driven by local/state regulations (e.g. Florida's HB 913, New York's Local Law 97)](https://fathom.video/share/pHaHJJ1jw_xk7DCwsH47ubfrgQMwjooa?tab=summary&timestamp=942.0)
  - [Rimkus acquired companies with expertise in region-specific regulations](https://fathom.video/share/pHaHJJ1jw_xk7DCwsH47ubfrgQMwjooa?tab=summary&timestamp=2243.0)
  - [Challenge: Keeping content up-to-date with evolving regulations while maintaining SEO performance](https://fathom.video/share/pHaHJJ1jw_xk7DCwsH47ubfrgQMwjooa?tab=summary&timestamp=2446.0)

### Client Types and Needs

  - [Building owners, property managers, real estate developers, investors](https://fathom.video/share/pHaHJJ1jw_xk7DCwsH47ubfrgQMwjooa?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Sometimes other technical experts (e.g. architects hiring Rimkus architects)](https://fathom.video/share/pHaHJJ1jw_xk7DCwsH47ubfrgQMwjooa?tab=summary&timestamp=1986.0)
  - [Clients value Rimkus for comprehensive services, reducing need to coordinate multiple vendors](https://fathom.video/share/pHaHJJ1jw_xk7DCwsH47ubfrgQMwjooa?tab=summary&timestamp=465.0)

### Content Strategy Considerations

  - [Emphasize sustainability, resilience, and maintainability in all services](https://fathom.video/share/pHaHJJ1jw_xk7DCwsH47ubfrgQMwjooa?tab=summary&timestamp=1777.0)
  - [Focus on long-term value and cost savings for clients](https://fathom.video/share/pHaHJJ1jw_xk7DCwsH47ubfrgQMwjooa?tab=summary&timestamp=1777.0)
  - [Highlight Rimkus' ability to provide end-to-end solutions for complex projects](https://fathom.video/share/pHaHJJ1jw_xk7DCwsH47ubfrgQMwjooa?tab=summary&timestamp=465.0)
  - [Consider creating micro-pages for specific regions/regulations using Foleon platform](https://fathom.video/share/pHaHJJ1jw_xk7DCwsH47ubfrgQMwjooa?tab=summary&timestamp=3038.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Erik to review provided documents and competitor examples (especially SGH and WJE)](https://fathom.video/share/pHaHJJ1jw_xk7DCwsH47ubfrgQMwjooa?tab=summary&timestamp=3455.0)
  - [Nohora to provide more detailed information on due diligence services](https://fathom.video/share/pHaHJJ1jw_xk7DCwsH47ubfrgQMwjooa?tab=summary&timestamp=3287.0)
  - [Team to consider refreshing existing facade ordinances pages with updated keywords and content](https://fathom.video/share/pHaHJJ1jw_xk7DCwsH47ubfrgQMwjooa?tab=summary&timestamp=3038.0)
  - [Explore potential for creating micro-pages using Foleon platform for region-specific content](https://fathom.video/share/pHaHJJ1jw_xk7DCwsH47ubfrgQMwjooa?tab=summary&timestamp=3038.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up meeting to discuss forensic services (moved to Friday)](https://fathom.video/share/pHaHJJ1jw_xk7DCwsH47ubfrgQMwjooa?tab=summary&timestamp=3579.0)
